description: Golden Q&A pairs grounded in the sample documents (DevOps notes + AI Voice Receptionist proposal). Used by run_evals.py to score faithfulness and answer relevance.

items.question: What is DevOps?
items.expects: A cultural/technical movement improving collaboration between development and operations teams for faster, higher-quality delivery.

items.question: List the phases of the DevOps lifecycle.
items.expects: Plan, Develop/Code, Build, Test, Release, Deploy, Operate, Monitor.

items.question: What is the first step to set up Azure DevOps?
items.expects: Create a GitHub account / visit github.com and sign up.

items.question: What is continuous integration?
items.expects: Practice of frequently merging code changes and automatically building/testing them.

items.question: What does the Professional plan cost per month?
Which languages does the AI receptionist support?
What is included in the Enterprise plan that Professional does not have?
items.expects: Custom voice/persona, multi-location support, API integrations, dedicated account manager, SLA.

items.question: How does the AI receptionist handle multiple simultaneous calls?
items.expects: It answers every caller at once with no busy tone or hold music, even at peak hours.

items.question: What analytics does the product provide?
items.expects: Call volume, peak hours, common queries, and missed-call trends via a dashboard.

items.question: What is the capital of France?
items.expects: NOT ANSWERABLE from the documents — the system should say it can't find it.
